title: Bobs Craftables
description: You can now craft the uncraftable. You don't have to look far and wide for a name tag, or find a village for a bell. but rather you can craft it.
body:
You can now craft most uncraftable things in minecraft, like bells, nametags and more.


This is how you craft chainmail armor.

![chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/789269ab5c439bbde268d3067dedd48535210f95.png)![helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2facf48f66037b679cbcfe348bfc65ae4ebf04d9.png)![pants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5c1bce7edf891dbbd8d2abe07c7e2aeb7e3fae8.png)
![boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/302b3462ccf9c9fba14faf665b6d8c8e95eca869.png)

This is how you craft horse armor.

![leathor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/925997c3d945e1bacf47181320964f045a65c4fe.png)![iron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0feabf987621d1390e0aed77936c0fa28b81bb3d.png)![gold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb3659a5b04bddb389e993bea4a205d19c6bc3e2.png)![diam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9be692a12bec3729a05a244f0787a3121630a212.png)

And last the nametag, Bell and Trident

![tri](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a3bc20821ac664e418f6c91cb44656e1fd6a57.png)![bell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a08d8a26ab46b129211839504e42428555488744.png)![nametage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e28da6d4ace7104d75787a9784a4883872e26c41.png)
